title: Sequences, Recurrences, and Discrete Change · Worked Case: Sequence Notation
summary: Forecast savings, inventory, and staged population processes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int sequence notation increment in a discrete recurrence forecast. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent explicit and recursive sequences and state valid index domains.
Fit amplitude, period, phase, and midline to a periodic dataset.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
